posts.text:
!!


Barack Obama (@BarackObama)

This interview, which is also available to listen to as a podcast, provides a useful overview of some of the dangerous trends we’ve been seeing in recent months regarding federalization and militarization of state and local police functions. nytimes.com/2025/08/27/opini…




— https://nitter.net/BarackObama/status/1961074450029318513#m

If any of you 200K are looking for a place to spend your journalism-supporting budget, I know of a pretty swell, hard-hitting newsletter. 

npr.org/2024/10/28/nx-s1-516…

New from me: Less than 5 percent of DA's offices have a unit tasked with seeking out wrongful convictions. I spoke with Marissa Bluestine of the Quattrone Center about what these units do well, what they could do better, and the obstacles they face.

(Link follows)

Despite (or because of) their success, CIUs now get pushback from Republican attorneys general, police departments who don't like to see their incompetence/corruption exposed, and city officials who fear the lawsuits wrought by exonerations.

Link:

radleybalko.substack.com/p/t…

We say goodbye to this handsome gentleman today. 

My wife @LilianaSegura adopted Wally 15 years ago. I don't know that any dog and human could be more perfectly suited for one another. Wally was nearly feral when Liliana got him. She spent the next several years . . .

. . . building his confidence and coaxing out the magnificent beast within him. I first met Wally five years into his life, and only got to see the marvelous result -- this loyal, determined, gentle, awkward, wonderfully empathetic fellow. Truly one of the Seven Great Dogs of his time. We will miss him terribly.
Trump is right. The U.S. is hot, baby. Hot like an electric fence.

*Thomas Chatterton Williams entering the death camps* at last, a central forum for many different perspectives to engage in open debate in a free exchange of information and ideas, with everyone on the same level
Oh my God. What an absolute fiasco

He wasn't just an asylum seeker. Paktyawal was an Afghan special forces soldier who worked with the U.S. Army's 3rd Special Forces Group. He was evacuated on August 30, 2021, entered the U.S. legally and had a pending case with a work permit and social security number. Killed by ICE maggots.
Trump is the biggest threat to the First Amendment since it was written. By far.
Journalists praising Trump for his ‘accessibility’ when he only uses that accessibility to insult and outright lie to them will never not be weird to me.

Oscar, watching the Oscars. 

He nabbed a big win earlier tonight for Best Good Boy.

“It was a reminder that, despite the hope and promise of this country, many Americans feel they cannot move about their lives freely without being targeted by the very people elected to represent them.”

www.thebulwark.com/p/what-lifes...

This bad for all of the reasons, but it’s also amusing for the variety pack of dangerous shit, obvious lies, and petty boasting. 

First president to join an NFL broadcast? Good for you, man.
I spent some time with Sonny Burton at the prison where they were supposed to kill him. My latest for @theintercept.com

The US military can take over the Strait of Hormuz. But it would require a big ground invasion and sustained occupation of Iran’s coastline (at minimum).

The straightforward reason why I, with no access to classified info, knew the US had no plan is because they didn’t position the assets to do it.

Once again, the military & the paramilitaries are carrying out illegal orders to commit murder, on multiple fronts, including the home front:

bsky.app/profile/mcop...

This should end any presidency immediately. It can't be fixed by more laws or court orders, bc Trump/the admin don't follow those.
I'd really like to see Mullin asked these questions in particular.

New at The Watch: 

Part one of my list of  questions for Markwayne Mullin.

Juries were never going to be a reliable bulwark.

But this is an absurd conviction.
Hilarious that in the same post threatening the media for spreading "hoaxes and distortions," the FCC Chair calls Trump's 1.5 percent margin in 2024 "a landslide election victory."
404 has been churning out really important and entrepreneurial reporting. This is typically excellent.
